basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26000/- to Rs. 57000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant (Administration) post at IIT Roorkee is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant (Administration) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant (Administration) position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation degree along with 5 years of relevant experience to be eligible for the Project Assistant (Administration) role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (Administration) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant (Administration) post ranges from Rs. 26,000 to Rs. 57,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant (Administration) post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (Administration) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant (Administration) post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job for the Project Assistant (Administration) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages on the IIT Roorkee website.
